Step 1: Understanding the Partial Correlation.
The partial correlation coefficient between two variables, keeping another variable fixed, can
be computed using the formula for partial correlation in terms of the covariance matrix Σ.
The formula for the partial correlation between X2 and X3, with X1 held constant, is given
